protein_name: Thought to be involved during neural development in axonal navigation at the ventral midline of the neural tube. In spinal chord development plays a role in guiding commissural axons probably by preventing premature sensitivity to Slit proteins thus inhibiting Slit signaling through ROBO1. Required for hindbrain axon midline crossing. Belongs to the immunoglobulin superfamily. ROBO family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: cell-cell adhesion mediator activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: axon guidance; axon midline choice point recognition; brain development; cell differentiation; chemotaxis; commissural neuron axon guidance; dendrite self-avoidance; homophilic cell-cell adhesion; negative regulation of negative chemotaxis; nervous system development; positive regulation of axon guidance; positive regulation of axonogenesis; tube development
raw_fields.Disease: Gaze Palsy, Familial Horizontal, With Progressive Scoliosis
